a2dp_sink_config_i2s_pins.message0: Configure receiver %1 I2S pins BCK %2 WS %3 DATA %4
a2dp_sink_config_i2s_pins.tooltip: Set the bit clock, word select, and data pins for an external I2S DAC

a2dp_sink_create.message0: Create Bluetooth audio receiver %1 output to %2
a2dp_sink_create.tooltip: Create a Bluetooth A2DP audio receiver (Sink) object

a2dp_sink_start.message0: Start the Bluetooth audio receiver %1 device name %2
a2dp_sink_start.tooltip: Start the Bluetooth audio receiver and set the Bluetooth name

a2dp_sink_on_metadata.message0: Receiver %1 is executed when metadata is received
a2dp_sink_on_metadata.tooltip: Executed when music metadata (title, artist, etc.) is received

a2dp_sink_on_connection_state.message0: Receiver %1 is executed when the connection status changes
a2dp_sink_on_connection_state.tooltip: Executed when the Bluetooth connection status changes

a2dp_sink_on_audio_state.message0: Receiver %1 is executed when the audio status changes
a2dp_sink_on_audio_state.tooltip: Executed when the audio playback status changes

a2dp_sink_get_audio_state.tooltip: Get the current audio playback status

a2dp_source_create.tooltip: Create a Bluetooth A2DP audio sender (Source) object

a2dp_source_start.message0: Start Bluetooth audio transmitter %1 Target device name %2
a2dp_source_start.tooltip: Start the Bluetooth audio transmitter and connect to the target device

a2dp_source_on_data_callback.message0: Transmitter %1 is executed when audio data is requested
a2dp_source_on_data_callback.tooltip: This callback function is called when audio data needs to be sent

a2dp_source_set_auto_reconnect.tooltip: Set whether to automatically reconnect to the last connected device
